/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -arch x86_64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/ExportFactoryProfiles.dir/Tools/ExportFactoryProfiles.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ExportFactoryProfiles.dir/Source/Profiles/ControllerProfile.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ExportFactoryProfiles.dir/Source/Engine/VelocityCurve.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ExportFactoryProfiles.dir/Source/Engine/VelocityEngine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ExportFactoryProfiles.dir/Source/Engine/MidiUtilities.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ExportFactoryProfiles.dir/JUCE/modules/juce_core/juce_core_CompilationTime.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ExportFactoryProfiles.dir/JUCE/modules/juce_core/juce_core.mm.o CMakeFiles/ExportFactoryProfiles.dir/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_basics/juce_audio_basics.mm.o CMakeFiles/ExportFactoryProfiles.dir/JUCE/modules/juce_data_structures/juce_data_structures.mm.o CMakeFiles/ExportFactoryProfiles.dir/JUCE/modules/juce_events/juce_events.mm.o -o ExportFactoryProfiles_artefacts/Release/ExportFactoryProfiles  -framework Accelerate -framework Cocoa -framework Foundation -framework IOKit -framework Security
